name: Risotto-Style Orzo with Tomatoes and Asiago Cheese
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup chicken stock or canned chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3 quarts water to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Add the orzo and 1 1/2 teaspoons salt; cook until the orzo is just tender, about 12 minutes.
3. Drain and cool the orzo slightly.
4. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a medium skillet.
5. Add onions and garlic; sauté until softened, about 3 minutes.
6. Stir in the orzo, chicken stock, and tomatoes; bring to a boil and simmer, stirring often until the liquid is absorbed by the orzo, about 5 minutes.
7. Stir in grated Asiago cheese and parsley. Season with 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon pepper or to taste.
8. Serve immediately.
